seoTitle: Rodd Point vs Rollands Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rodd Point and Rollands Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rodd Point vs Rollands Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rodd Point and Rollands Plains.
heading: Rodd Point vs Rollands Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rodd Point, New South Wales and Rollands Plains, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rollands Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Rodd Point (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rodd Point or Rollands Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rodd Point has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Rollands Plains scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rodd Point scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Rollands Plains scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rodd Point or Rollands Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rollands Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
